patch:
--- a/synchronizer.v
+++ b/synchronizer.v
@@ -1,12 +1,12 @@
 module dff_synchronizer_32bit(
   input clk,
   input rst_n,
   input [31:0] data_in,
   output reg [31:0] data_out
 );
 
-  always @(posedge clk) begin
+  always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
     if (~rst_n)
       data_out <= 32'b0;
     else
       data_out <= data_in;
   end
 
 endmodule
